title: Eligible spin-offs - Canada.ca
content:
## How do I find out if I can elect in respect of a particular foreign spin-off?
The following corporations have given the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) permission to publish the fact that their spin-off shares meet the conditions of section 86.1. For spin-offs not listed, contact the corporation that distributed the spin-off shares, either directly or through a broker, to determine if the shares meet the eligibility criteria for the tax deferral election.
